summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Contrats CCPA feature. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed (100%). The feature allows managing CCPA contracts linked to chantiers with pre-filled client information and editable fields.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa returns list of contrats
Backend: POST /api/contrats-ccpa creates contrat pre-filled from chantier
Backend: GET /api/contrats-ccpa/{id} returns specific contrat
Backend: PUT /api/contrats-ccpa/{id} updates editable fields (client_nom, interlocuteur, adresse, email, telephone, prix, unite, date_signature)
Backend: Status workflow brouillon -> envoye -> signe works correctly
Backend: Filter by status works
Backend: Duplicate contrat per chantier is prevented
Backend: DELETE /api/contrats-ccpa/{id} removes contrat
Backend: GET /api/chantiers/{id}/contrat-ccpa returns contrat for chantier
Backend: Non-existent contrat returns 404
Frontend: Navigation - Contrats tab visible in sidebar
Frontend: Page loads with title 'Contrats CCPA'
Frontend: Table displays columns: N° Contrat, Chantier, Client, Tarif, Gasoil, Date, Statut, Actions
Frontend: Create dialog with chantier selection works
Frontend: View dialog shows Prestataire and Donneuse d'ordres sections
Frontend: Edit dialog shows all editable fields
Frontend: Edit and save updates data correctly
Frontend: Status workflow buttons work (Marquer comme envoyé, Marquer comme signé)
Frontend: Toast notifications appear on success
Frontend: Counter updates (X signés • Y en attente)
seed_data_creation: Test client and chantier created and cleaned up during pytest execution. Existing contrat CCPA-2026-03-3E5301 was used for UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Contrats CCPA feature is fully implemented and tested. Contrats are linked to chantiers and pre-filled with client info. Editable fields: client_nom, client_interlocuteur, client_adresse, client_email, client_telephone, prix_unitaire, unite_facturation, date_signature. Status workflow: brouillon -> envoye -> signe. Each chantier can only have one contrat CCPA.
